decisionObjects.recommendation: Rewrite homepage — lead with proof, then packages, then a single Book CTA
decisionObjects.explanation: I recommend "Rewrite homepage — lead with proof, then packages, then a single Book CTA" but I'm waiting for your approval before changing anything. Confidence 90%, Evidence Quality 78%, Business Alignment 100%, Customer Impact 72%, Experience Impact 75%, Risk medium, Requires Approval Yes, Overall Decision Score 83%.

I can proceed with "Move Reviews Higher" automatically. Confidence 96%, Evidence Quality 88%, Business Alignment 100%, Customer Impact 72%, Experience Impact 75%, Risk low, Requires Approval No, Overall Decision Score 88%.

I paused on "Rewrite homepage for luxury branding" because I need a bit more information. Missing: industry, target_customer, business_name. Confidence 68%, Evidence Quality 35%, Business Alignment 15%, Customer Impact 67%, Experience Impact 75%, Risk medium, Requires Approval Yes, Overall Decision Score 52%.
